context: Academic and educational security analysis for mobile APIs

checklist.description: API should implement proper authentication mechanisms
Authorization checks should be performed on the server side
Sensitive data should be protected in transit and at rest
Error messages should not reveal technical details
Security events should be logged for monitoring (cannot be verified passively)
API should implement rate limiting to prevent abuse (cannot be verified passively)

issues.recommendation: Implement authentication for all sensitive endpoints

conclusion: The API has 8 security issues requiring immediate attention. Multiple critical vulnerabilities were identified that could lead to data exposure or unauthorized access. Security Score: 0/100.
